text: Read the data and answer. A project has four stages in order: Conceptualization, Design, Execution, Testing. Days each person takes -- Amitabh: 10/7/8/13; Bharadwaj: 8/16/14/28; Chetan: 12/24/5/11; Daljit: 22/6/9/6 (Conceptualization/Design/Execution/Testing). A1 (Conceptualization + Testing) is done by Amitabh & Chetan; A2 (Design + Execution) by Bharadwaj & Daljit. Amitabh & Daljit start 2 Jan 2026; Bharadwaj & Chetan start 5 Jan 2026. Amitabh & Bharadwaj work on alternate days; Chetan & Daljit work daily. In January Amitabh works at 75% efficiency. Stages run strictly in order; a new phase starts only on a fresh day. Conceptualization can, at the earliest, be completed by:
explanation: Amitabh (0.075/working day on alternate days, from 2 Jan) and Chetan (1/12 per day, from 5 Jan) together complete Conceptualization around 12-13 January, so the earliest completion is about 13 January.

text: Read the data and answer. Export of services (million $) -- Food: Jul 0.9, Aug 1.4, Sep 2.2, Oct 2.5, Nov 2.0. Clothes: 1.1, 0.9, 1.1, 1.1, 1.6. Labour: 0.6, 0.9, 1.4, 2.1, 1.8. Vehicles: 2.0, 1.2, 2.4, 2.8, 2.6. Over July to November, which sector shows the LEAST percentage growth in exports?
explanation: July-to-November growth: Food 122%, Clothes 45%, Labour 200%, Vehicles (2.0->2.6) only 30% - the least.
